title: ViewModel+
description: ViewModel+ is a lightweight CPvP-focused resource pack that refines item positions for cleaner visuals, better visibility, and smoother first-person combat.
body:
---

# ViewModel+

**ViewModel+** is a clean, PvP-optimized resource pack for **Minecraft 1.20+** that adjusts item positions in first-person view to improve clarity and visibility during combat. It’s designed to help you land hits, track enemies, and combo more effectively without clutter or distraction.

## Features

* Refined item and hand positions for swords, bows, tools, etc.
* Clean first-person visuals for better PvP awareness
* Great for crystal PvP, pot PvP, or any fast-paced combat
* Pairs well with any texture pack — just load on top

## Screenshots
![ViewModel+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def5af1583eaa3dfb45229f24f582262b77f6ee6_0.webp)
## Compatibility

* Made for **Minecraft 1.13.X - 1.21.X**
* Works with Sodium, Iris, and most modern mods
* Resource pack only — no mod installation needed

## Installation

1. Download the ZIP file
2. Move it to your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in-game via **Options → Resource Packs**
